cost.q: How much does it cost to use the app?
cost.a: The app is free to use with all core features, including up to 10 referral and 10 affiliate orders. Once you reach this limit, you can <1>upgrade</1> to the Premium plan for unlimited orders and full features, with no extra charges or hidden fees.

how_referral.q: How does the referral program work?
how_referral.a: Customers get a unique referral link to share with friends, friends place an order using that link, and once the order is completed, rewards are automatically issued to both the referrer and the friend. For more details, please refer to the guideline <1>here</1>.

landing.q: How I create a landing page for referral program?
landing.a: You can create a referral landing page in your store where customers learn about your referral program and instantly join or get their unique referral link or code. This page highlights how the program works, shows rewards earned, and can be added to your navigation or shared in emails. For more details, please refer to the guideline <1>here</1>.

how_affiliate.q: How does the affiliate program work?
how_affiliate.a: Affiliates sign up and get a unique tracking link to share, customers click that link and make a purchase, BLOOP tracks the sale and records the commission for the affiliate, and you can review activity and payouts. For more details, please refer to the guideline <1>here</1>.

payouts.a: No, BLOOP does not transfer payouts automatically. We track and display all payout details, and merchants handle the actual payouts to affiliates manually.

diff.q: What is the difference between referral and affiliate programs?
diff.a: Referral programs typically reward customers with discounts or cash for inviting friends to your store, while affiliate programs pay commissions to partners or creators for driving sales. Referrals focus on customer-to-customer sharing, whereas affiliates are performance-based partnerships. For more details, please refer to the guideline <1>here</1>.
